tree.name: Trey Murphy III
tree.tradeDescription: 3-team trade: NOP sends Adams, Bledsoe, Ziaire Williams (#10), Jared Butler (#40), 2022 2nd, 2025 2nd to MEM; Iwundu, cash, 2022 1st (#15) to CHA. NOP receives Murphy, Valanciunas, Boston Jr. from MEM; Graham from CHA.
tree.note: Virginia forward drafted 17th by Memphis, traded to New Orleans

assetsGivenUp.name: Steven Adams
